headline: Before The Surge, CAT Stock Was Sending A Power-Grid Sized Signal
summary: While the market was focused on its slowing construction business, one of Caterpillar’s divisions was quietly building a record-breaking order book that hinted at the rally to come.

raw.headline: Before The Surge, CAT Stock Was Sending A Power-Grid Sized Signal
raw.summary: While the market was focused on its slowing construction business, one of Caterpillar’s divisions was quietly building a record-breaking order book that hinted at the rally to come.

headline: Paccar begins software updates after EPA revises DEF inducement guidance
summary: Trucks manufactured after 2018 can go to Kenworth and Peterbilt dealerships to have the software installed.
